where.if: AND (content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.diary (ymd, content, summary) VALUES (#{ymd}, #{content}, #{summary})
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.diary SET ymd = #{ymd}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, ymd, content, summary, created_at, updated_at, (SELECT count(*) FROM cms.file_match fm WHERE fm.table_name = 'diary' AND fm.target_id = d.id AND fm.file_type = 'attachment') as attachmentCount FROM cms.diary d
ORDER BY ymd DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{skip}
